   "reasoning": "I'm exhausted and my students are suffering, so I need real help now. Hiring more staff is the only way to reduce my class size and give me a fighting chance to reach each kid. I also need counseling programs to support the kids who are barely holding on - I've got papers to grade and parents to call, but I just can't do it all alone. Funding boosts and scholarships can help, but without more staff, we're just putting Band-Aids on a broken system.",
